title: Mob Variations
description: Adds more Randomness to Minecraft mobs!
body:
# Adds variety to Minecraft mobs!                                          

## Randomized Attributes:                                          
- Size (scale and health)                                          
- Movement speed                                          
- Attack damage                                          

## Traits:                                          
- Giant: 2x Size                                          
- Tiny: 0.3x Size                                          
- Toxic: Poison cloud around entity                                          
- Flaming: places fire under entity                                          

All traits are compatible with eachother except Tiny and Giant.

## Special Variants:
- Berserk Skeleton: Has an axe instead of a bow
- Kraken: Giant squid, damages nearby entities and attempts to drown them

### List of entities that are not affected by this datapack: 
                                        
- Armor Stand                                          
- Interaction                                          
- Block Display                                          
- Item Display                                          
- Experience Orb                                          
- Item                                          
- Player                                          
- Area Effect Cloud                                          
- Falling Block                                          
- tnt                                          
- fireball                                          
- small_fireball                                          
- dragon_fireball                                          
- firework_rocket                                          
- minecart                                          
- chest_minecart                                          
- boat                                          
- chest_boat                                          
- arrow                                          
- command_block_minecart                                          
- egg                                          
- snowball                                          
- trident                                          
- end_crystal                                          
- ender_pearl                                          
- evoker_fangs                                          
- experience_bottle                                          
- furnace_minecart                                          
- item_frame                                          
- glow_item_frame                                          
- hopper_minecart                                          
- leash_knot                                          
- lightning_bolt                                          
- marker                                          
- painting                                          
- potion                                          
- shulker_bullet                                          
- spawner_minecart                                          
- spectral_arrow                                          
- text_display                                          
- tnt_minecart                                          
- wither_skull              
- elder_guardian                            
- wind_charge                                          
- breeze_wind_charge (moyang why tf is this a separate entity?)                                          

### You can also summon an entity with the ignore_ra tag to prevent the datapack from affecting this entity.
